turns.q: Can I change the shipping address on an order I just placed?
turns.replyTail:
I can help with orders, tracking, product questions, and more!

Today
Can I change the shipping address on an order I just placed?

Hi! Yes — if you placed the order within the last 30 minutes, you can usually update the shipping address yourself.

Open the email from us titled “Order #SM_____ Confirmed” and click “Edit or View your order.” From there, you can change the address, cancel, edit items, and more.

If you’d rather I check it with you, please send your order number.

turns.replyTail:
d your order number.

Can I cancel an order after placing it, and is there a time window?

Hi! Yes — there’s a time window.

Under 45 minutes: you can usually cancel it yourself through the “Edit or View your order” button in your order confirmation email
Between 45 minutes and 1 hour: I may be able to cancel it for you here if you send your order number
After 1 hour: cancellations are no longer possible

If you want, send me your order number and I can help with the next step.

Powered by Siena

turns.q: Can I add an item to an order I already placed?
turns.replyTail:
an item to an order I already placed?

Hi! If it’s been within 45 minutes of placing your order, you can usually add an item yourself through the “Edit or View your order” button in your order confirmation email.

After 45 minutes, we can’t add items to an existing order here. You’d need to place a separate order for the additional item.

If you want, send your order number and I can help you figure out which option applies. Let me know if there’s anything else I can help with!

Powered by Siena

turns.q: What happens if it already shipped — can it still be changed?
turns.replyTail:
help with!

What happens if it already shipped — can it still be changed?

Hi! Once an order has already shipped, it can’t be changed or canceled.

That includes things like:

changing the shipping address
adding or removing items
canceling the order

If the issue is the shipping address, and it’s too late to update, you can file a shipping claim at claims.simplemodern.com to have the products resent to the correct address.

Let me know if there’s anything else I can help with!

Powered by Siena

turns.q: How do I update my contact or account details?
turns.replyTail:
details?

Hi! You can usually update your contact or account details in your account settings on simplemodern.com.

If you’re unable to update them there, you can submit a request through our privacy page to correct your account information using your email address.

If you meant the contact details on a specific order instead, send me the order number and I can help with that too. Let me know if there’s anything else I can help with! 💛

How did we do? We'd love your feedback!

If I cancel, how long until I'm refunded?

Hi! If your order is successfully canceled, the refund typically shows up in 3–5 business days.

The exact timing can vary a bit depending on your bank or card provider.

Let me know if there’s anything else I can help with! 💛
